value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI that turns structured resume data into polished PDFs, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX, and Markdown, featuring pluggable templates and multi-agent AI assessment. Built in Go with support for advanced document formats and AI-powered evaluation.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Open ecosystem for tool-agnostic AI agent memory, implemented in Rust and Python. Enables seamless integration of memory modules across diverse AI frameworks.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK and CLI for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and retrieval-augmented generation pipelines. Bridges agent orchestration and graph-based knowledge management in a single toolkit.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: Flappy Bird clone using JavaFX and Java 21, showcasing data-oriented design patterns and automated native builds for desktop platforms. Serves as a cross-platform game development demo.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with object-oriented design and command-line interface in Python. Ideal for learning game logic, exploring chess AI, or playing from the terminal.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Rust-based tool for capturing showcase screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal, distributed as a single binary with no runtime dependencies.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, featuring modular architecture, Q-Learning integration, and automated hyperparameter optimization. Supports reinforcement learning and classification tasks.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project investigating optimal image classification architectures for small datasets, highlighting the impact of data quantity on deep learning performance. Built with Jupyter Notebook and Python.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi, with Homebrew/apt integration and per-language version managers. Provides one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux environments.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient-described symptoms, achieving high recall through semantic embeddings and feature extraction.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go library for durable execution: wrap functions, run workers, and manage ledgers and queues over existing storage. Simplifies reliable task processing in Go applications.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding plugin for Neovim, enabling spoken intent to trigger edits directly in the editor. Built with Lua, Rust, and Vim Script.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Rust apply engine and evaluation CLI. Supports multi-language integration for generative workflows.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered GitHub profile metrics with SVG visualizations, project classification, and README generation. Available as CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementation of OpenAI Gymnasium environments, enabling reinforcement learning experimentation without Python dependencies.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js. Showcases web development and interactive research content.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI, Rust crate, and GitHub Action for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers. Facilitates automated documentation and code inclusion.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, enabling scalable deployment and sandboxing of agents with workspace metrics. Built in Go.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with terminal user interface, written in Rust. Simplifies agent orchestration and skill management.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: BCS thesis on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, documented in TeX. Academic exploration of genetic programming techniques.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Testbed for observable language models where every hidden state is a readable distribution over words, enabling interpretability by construction. Built in Python for language model research.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Drop-in stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning. Simplifies robust model evaluation in deep learning workflows.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally. Connects ideas securely without cloud dependencies.

value.name: oag
value.summary: Fast OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, supporting SSE streaming and zero runtime dependencies. Built with Rust and Jinja.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI in Rust, offering automated semantic versioning from conventional commits. Distributed as a single static binary with full configurability.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support. Focused on communication-driven learning materials.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README for the developer, auto-generated and updated to showcase projects and skills.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust, supporting robust and modular stream processing.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct control of Zigbee devices by AI agents, with no cloud or hub required. Built in Go and Shell.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproducible example for a Cypress issue, using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Serves as a bug report or test case.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Android trading app built with Clean Architecture and MVVM, enabling peer-to-peer item exchanges. Demonstrates enterprise-grade mobile development patterns.

preamble.value: I build full-stack systems for AI agents and generative workflows—streaming, modular, and memory-driven. My toolkit: Rust, Go, and TypeScript. See incipit for AI-powered resume generation, and saige for unified agent orchestration.
